subcodes.first_line: O servant, earnest and beseeching at the Threshold of the Abhá Kingdom! In this eternal morn, when the lights of the Abhá Kingdom illumine the realms of the unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مبتهل متضرع بملکوت ابهی در این صبح بقا که انوار ملکوت ابهی ممالک غیب
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @East and West; communication between East and West, @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual transformation, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
